packaging/Build-Msix.ps1||root||tools/ma.note: Different files, different languages (PowerShell vs Python), each independently computing its own repo root using idiomatic per-language naming ($root local vs ROOT module constant). No shared state, no coupling.

src/PdfLiteViewer/PdfPrintPaginator.cs||.note: Both are required overrides of the abstract System.Windows.Documents.DocumentPaginator base class - distinct bool/int members mandated by the .NET framework API, not an app-level duplicate. Token-overlap false positive on the shared "PageCount" substring.

tools/make_icons.py|draw_icon|lift||tool.note: lift is a vertical Y-offset for page-corner lift; shade_w is a horizontal width for the spine shading polygon. Distinct semantics, coincidentally same 0.045 ratio for visual proportion.

tools/make_icons.py||BG_BOT||tools/make_.note: BG_BOT is the gradient bottom color, SPINE is the book-spine line color; distinct design tokens that happen to share the same dark-green RGB by aesthetic choice, not a required invariant.
